text:
For millennia, the number line started at 1. If
f you had five a
apples and
five away, you
did not have a number to represent
gave all
your state;
you simply had a void, a lack of apples. Civilisations like the Babylonians
and Mayans used j
placeholders — symbols to indicate an empty c
column
in a number -but they
did
not treat ‘nothing
as a number t
that
you
could add, subtract, and multiply.
